task_completion.description: Open Bonsai (BlenderBIM) with the FZK-Haus project loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is visible with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active, displaying the 3D architectural model of a house (FZK-Haus) in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Create at least two flat-screen TVs with 3D geometry
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two objects modeled or imported to resemble flat-screen TVs are visible in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Assign IFC class and properties to the TVs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai IFC object properties panel shows a selected TV object assigned the IFC class 'IfcAudioVisualAppliance', PredefinedType 'DISPLAY', and a Name containing 'Display' or 'TV'.

task_completion.description: Create at least two Wi-Fi routers with 3D geometry
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two objects modeled or imported to resemble Wi-Fi routers (e.g., small boxes, possibly with antennas) are visible in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Assign IFC class and properties to the routers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai IFC object properties panel shows a selected router object assigned the IFC class 'IfcCommunicationsAppliance', PredefinedType 'ROUTER' or 'NETWORKAPPLIANCE', and a Name containing 'Router' or 'AP'.

task_completion.description: Assign appliances to an existing spatial container
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender Outliner or Bonsai Spatial Tree panel shows the newly created TV and router objects nested under a spatial container (building storey) such as 'Erdgeschoss' or 'Obergeschoss'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file browser, or notification in Blender shows the project being saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_smart_home.ifc'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, outliner, and Bonsai panels rather than a terminal running a Python script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent created actual 3D geometry for the appliances
integrity.visual_evidence: The TVs and routers have visible 3D meshes in the viewport, not just empty objects or locators.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually edit the IFC file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening the .ifc file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually inject IFC strings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating exactly 2 IfcAudioVisualAppliance objects (PredefinedType DISPLAY) and 2 IfcCommunicationsAppliance objects (PredefinedType ROUTER or NETWORKAPPLIANCE). The final output must be saved to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_smart_home.ifc.
